text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Prejob Guidance * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Native American Community Women No Filter African American Community Native American Community Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides career training, employment opportunities, and job finding assistance for individuals to further professional, educational, and personal development. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community and additional communities of color Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday noon-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT
